mechanics.excerpt: SOCIETY AND CuLtURE tured and reverse-engineer it: We had to bridge the gap Or we die trying high-Tech breakthrougks: ThE BATTLEMECH from the Abridged Encyclopedia Galactica Universal Press; 3062 With Its debut in 2439, the BattleMech radically altered the way humans waged war: BattlaMechs were faster; more maneu- verable and more versatile than conventional tanks; and com- bat commanders Immediately recognized their value: Even nOW, six centuries later; the 'Mech remains "king of the battlatield: Generally humanoid In appearance (though several mod: els use less conventional four-legged design) , BattleMechs commonly range from ten to fourteen meters in height and weigh anywhere from 20 t0 100 tons.
